title: 20 Pieces Wooden Handle Paint Brushes - Nylon Bristles, Dust Yellow, for Art Painting, Drawing, Cleaning, Dust Brushing, Glue Application (11mm)
features: Package Contents: 20 Pieces small yellow brushes, enough for you. They are 17cm (6.69 inches) in length and 12.7mm (0.5 inch) in width.
Excellent Material: Made of high-quality environmentally friendly nylon and wood, the surface is smooth, lint-free, high quality and durable.
Lightweight & Comfortable Handle: High-quality brushes can hold more paint to save time with less streaks and help you to finish your painting better.
Easy to Clean: Paint flat brush is very easy to clean, You can easily clean them after use, so they can be reused at any time.
Widely Used: Used for all kinds of paints, but also for emulsion, chalk, primer, top coat, gloss, water-based, acrylic, poster, watercolor, satin, oil, wood and plaster paint.
